prompt: {"type":"mecha character turnaround sheet","subject":{"category":"humanoid combat robot","design":"sleek biomechanical sci-fi exosuit with sharp angular armor plating and exposed mechanical joints","primary color":"{argument name=\"armor color\" default=\"pale olive gray\"}","secondary color":"dark graphite metal","accent color":"tiny red sensor lights","head":{"shape":"narrow armored helmet with a pointed faceplate and 2 long upward horn-like antennae","eyes":"small glowing red visor-like sensors"},"torso":{"build":"broad armored chest with layered segmented plates and a tapered waist","details":"dense pistons, cables, vents, and internal machinery visible between armor gaps"},"arms":{"right arm":"integrated long rifle-like weapon running along the forearm","left arm":"hand plus a large elongated shield blade mounted along the forearm"},"legs":{"style":"digitigrade mechanical legs with heavy thigh armor, exposed knee mechanisms, and pointed armored feet"},"back":{"attachments":"2 long rear-mounted blade or fin appendages and a central spine-like backpack assembly"}},"layout":{"background":"plain light gray studio backdrop","presentation":"clean concept art sheet","views":[{"position":"left","view":"front view","count":1},{"position":"center","view":"left side profile","count":1},{"position":"right","view":"back view","count":1}],"total_views":3},"style":{"rendering":"high-detail industrial concept art","linework":"precise hard-surface mechanical drawing with crisp edges","surface":"worn matte armor with subtle scratches and panel seams","lighting":"soft neutral even lighting","composition":"full-body figures centered vertically with ample spacing between views"}}
translatedPrompt: {"type":"机甲角色三视图","subject":{"category":"人形战斗机器人","design":"流线型生物机械科幻外骨骼，配有锋利的棱角装甲板和外露的机械关节","primary color":"{argument name=\"armor color\" default=\"浅橄榄灰\"}","secondary color":"深石墨金属色","accent color":"微小的红色传感器灯","head":{"shape":"窄型装甲头盔，带有尖头面罩和 2 个向上延展的长角状天线","eyes":"小型发光红色护目镜式传感器"},"torso":{"build":"宽阔的装甲胸部，带有分层式装甲板和收窄的腰部","details":"装甲缝隙间可见密集的活塞、线缆、通风口和内部机械结构"},"arms":{"right arm":"集成在小臂上的长步枪式武器","left arm":"手部及安装在小臂上的大型长条形盾刃"},"legs":{"style":"趾行式机械腿，配有厚重的腿部装甲、外露的膝部机械结构和尖头装甲足"},"back":{"attachments":"2 个后置长刃或鳍状附属物，以及一个中央脊柱式背包组件"}},"layout":{"background":"纯浅灰色摄影棚背景","presentation":"简洁的概念艺术图","views":[{"position":"左","view":"正面视图","count":1},{"position":"中","view":"左侧视图","count":1},{"position":"右","view":"背面视图","count":1}],"total_views":3},"style":{"rendering":"高细节工业概念艺术","linework":"精准的硬表面机械绘图，线条清晰锐利","surface":"磨损的哑光装甲，带有细微划痕和面板接缝","lighting":"柔和的中性均匀光照","composition":"全身像垂直居中排列，视图间留有充足空间"}}

breakdown.creativeCore: 科幻机甲三视图：一份详细的人形战斗机器人三视图概念图，适用于机甲设计、游戏概念艺术以及工业风科幻角色开发。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, full-body, layered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: sci-fi, studio]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
[是否含文字/精确文字/可读性要求]。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
